title: Treeplacer for WWOO [Datapack]
description: Treeplacer Datapack for William Wyther's Overhauled Overworld.
body:
Ever played with [Wiliam Wyther's Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo), which adds custom trees to world gen that you can't grow?

With [Treeplacer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/treeplacer/files/5863532) and this datapack you can now grow those beautiful custom trees yourself!

Features:
- Every sapling now grows a custom tree from WWOO!
- Some saplings grow different trees depending on the biome they are placed in!

If you find any issues or trees that don't fit into a biome, do not hesitate to hit me up on the WWOO discord! ~(^-^ ~)
